'''Vreni Island''' was a small island in a southern sea on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. A small settlement on the island also bore the name of Vreni Island.

==Description==
The Vreni Island settlement was a prime tourist location, where people could stay at a luxurious hotel or dine at outdoor cafes. A notable attraction within the settlement was the outdoor [[Grand Theater of Vreni Island]].<ref name="SWG:GToVI" /> Outside the settlement was a dense forest and a beautiful beach.

==History==
As the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] escalated after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the city eventually became a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] stronghold.<ref name="GG" />

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> Vreni Island hosted a large [[Life Day/Legends|Life Day]] celebration. A group of [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], including [[Kkatamik]], traveled to the city in order to spread the ideals of Life Day.<ref name="SWG:WLD">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=event|Wookiee Life Day}}</ref>

[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Mirax Terrik Horn]] kept a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of the island in [[Horn apartment|their home]].<ref name="IJ">''[[I, Jedi]]''</ref>

==Inhabitants==
[[Karrek Flim]], [[Venthan Chassu/Legends|Venthan Chassu]], and [[Vinya Maysor]] were residents or visitors of the city after the Battle of Yavin.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tyrena appeared in the video game ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Star Wars video games#Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online role-playing game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The name Vreni Island refers to both the geographical island and the settlement on the island.<ref name="SWG" /> In the game, Vreni Island is a permanent stronghold for the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="GG" /> With the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 15 December 04|Publish 11.5]]" on [[December 14]], [[2004]], Vreni Island was the host of the yearly in-game event known as the Wookiee Life Day.<ref name="P11.5">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/board/message?board.id=swgpatchnotes&message.id=375|text=Update Notes - December 14, 2004 - Publish 11.5}}</ref> The Life Day event was later completely revamped and moved to other cities the subsequent years.<ref name="CLD">{{SonyCite|url=players/news_archive.vm?id=67531&month=122007|text=Friday Feature – Celebrating Life Day}}</ref>
